infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy needs camera access to capture photos and videos at events.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy needs microphone access for video and audio recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy saves branded content to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy uses Face ID for secure app access.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy uses NFC to instantly share and receive contact cards.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy uses your location to tag scanned contacts with region data (city, province, country).
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy adds events to your calendar with automatic reminders.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: AMOS by Inclufy adds events to your calendar with automatic reminders.

plugins.cameraPermission: AMOS by Inclufy heeft camera nodig om event content te maken.

plugins.microphonePermission: AMOS by Inclufy heeft microfoon nodig voor audio-opname en transcriptie.

plugins.photosPermission: AMOS by Inclufy slaat branded afbeeldingen op in je fotobibliotheek.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: AMOS by Inclufy gebruikt je locatie om gescande contacten te taggen met regio-informatie.

plugins.calendarPermission: AMOS by Inclufy voegt events toe aan je agenda met automatische herinneringen.

plugins.photosPermission: AMOS by Inclufy heeft toegang nodig tot je fotobibliotheek om een logo te selecteren.
